title: Healing where there was hurt
summary: Research shines light on boarding schools in Alaska Benjamin Jacuk was surprised to be nominated for the 2022 Alaska Young Professional of the Year award, and even more surprised when he was announced as the winner. But he is also grateful for the award, because it reminds him of the people who have influenced his life. “I’m extremely grateful for getting it. My grandfather died last ye...

summary: On June 22, YKHC reports fifty-two new cases of COVID-19 in the YK Delta. title: We’re Hiring!

title: Ice Meets Math At LeConte Glacier
summary: Students have been surveying LeConte Glacier in Southeast since 1983, making it one of the nation's longest running citizen science projects. The post Ice Meets Math At LeConte Glacier appeared first on Alaska Magazine .

title: Two hospitalizations and fifty-four new cases of COVID-19 in the YK Delta June 18-21
